content:
Premium Organic Red Beet Crystal from Switzerland

What are Red Beet Crystals

Red beet crystals are different from normal red beet powder. While normal red beet powder is made by drying the whole red beet and crushing them into powder, red beet crystals are extracted from red beet juice using a patented crystallization process.

Red beet crystals are produced without carrier substances like maltodextrin using a special drying procedure. Hence, the finished product is naturally sweet, contains all the valuable constituents of the fresh red beets and instantly soluble.

Why Red Beet Crystals?

1. High concentration & potency
200g Red Beet Crystals = 1.82kg Red Beet Juice = 2.68kg Fresh Red Beet

2. Can be served in many ways
Consume directly or blend with water, juice, smoothies, or food

3. Superior taste and texture
It tastes better than normal red beet powder in the market. Naturally sweet and instantly soluble in water.

Nutrients in Red Beet:
• Nitrates - Convert to nitric oxide in the body, dilates blood vessels
• Iron - Enhances oxygen-carrying capacity of blood
• Betaine - Interferes with inflammatory signalling process
• Vitamin B - Supports liver health
• Fiber - Clears toxins from liver
• Antioxidants - Protects cells from damage

Organic vs Non-organic Cultivation:
Organic: No toxic persistent pesticides, No GMOs, No antibiotics, No growth hormones, No sludge & irradiation, Low environmental pollution, Certification required
Non-organic: Allows all the above

Key Benefits of Red Beet:

Helps in Blood Pressure
Studies have shown that red beets can significantly lower blood pressure by up to 4–10 mmHg. These blood pressure-lowering effects are likely due to the high concentration of nitrates in red beets. Nitrates are compounds that convert to nitric oxide in the body. Nitric oxide dilates your blood vessels, which helps lower blood pressure and heart rate.

Boosts Energy Levels
Once again, nitrate play an important role. Nitrates in red beet help improve blood flow, cell signalling, and hormones – all of which play a role in increasing the energy levels. In addition, red beet is rich in iron and it can enhance the oxygen-carrying capacity of the blood. It also reduces the amount of the oxygen the muscles need to perform optimally.

Fights Inflammation
Chronic inflammation is related to diseases such as obesity, heart disease and liver disease. The betaine in red beets can reduce inflammation due to its ability to interfere with the inflammatory signalling process.

Good For Liver
Red beets have an abundance of nutrients that keep your liver healthy — such as iron, antioxidants, betaine, and vitamin B. Red beets also thin the bile, allowing it to easily flow through the liver and small intestine – this further enhances liver health.

Betaine in red beets also helps the liver eliminate toxins while the fiber in red beets clears the toxins that have been removed from the liver – making sure they don't enter the body again.

Improve Heart Health
Red beet fiber helps to reduce cholesterol and triglycerides by increasing the level of HDL cholesterol (good cholesterol). The presence of betaine lowers the levels of homocysteine in the body which can also be harmful to the blood vessels. Thus, consumption of red beets helps to prevent cardiovascular disease in multiple ways. As a result, conditions like high blood pressure, heart attacks, and stokes are less likely to develop.
